'''''Live-Action Adventures''''' was a roleplaying guide rulebook published by [[West End Games]] for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''. It was written by [[Tony Russo|Anthony Russo]] and [[Scott Heinig]] and was first published in August [[1996]].<ref name="Amazon" />

It features rules for Live Action Role Playing for gamers, based on the rules of the S''tar Wars: The Roleplaying Game''. The book also includes the adventure "[[The Shard of Alderaan]]."

{{Book-stub}}
